emails.subject: Board presentation
emails.body: Board presentation Can you please email me a list of the development sites we have sold this year, what our basis was and what p7l we expect of have from each site. Please include Onondaga and Doyle, AES site etc. I need it asap. Thanks Louise

emails.subject: RE: Board presentation
emails.body: RE: Board presentation Sure thing. I'll get it to you this morning. What's a p71? Regards, Ben

emails.subject: RE: Board presentation
emails.body: Louise: I've attached a draft for your review which includes sites that we expect to sell this year. Let me know if you have any questions, or if you'd like me to make changes. Please note the amounts reflected on the sheet do not include Ft. Pierce. Regards, Ben
